Section 2 [except clause (i) and clause (xiii)] and section 3; 2. Section 7; 3. Section 9; 4. Sections 11 and 12; 5. Section 14; 6. Section 17; 7. Sections 27 to 29 (both inclusive); 8. Section 32; 9. Sections 34 and 35; 10. Section 38; 11. Sections 41 to 45 (both inclusive); 12. Sections 47 and 48; 13. Sections 50 and 51; 14. Section 53; 15. Sections 59 and 60; 16. Sections 63 to 65 (both inclusive); 17. Sections 72 to 74 (both inclusive); 18. Sections 77 to 79 (both inclusive); 19. Section 82; 20. Sections 84 and 85; 21. Sections 90 to 93 (both inclusive). [F. No. 1 /1 /2018-CL.I] K.V.R. MURTY, Joint Secry.
